headline: Dow Jones Stock 3M Nears Buy Point On AI Data Center Win
summary: 3M's hot new optical technology for data centers is being deployed by Microsoft Azure, the companies announced on Wednesday.  3M said on its April 21 earnings call that its new expanded beam optics technology had received validation and a significant order from a hyperscaler, which has apparently now been revealed to be Microsoft.

content.title: Dow Jones Stock 3M Nears Buy Point On AI Data Center Win
content.summary: 3M's hot new optical technology for data centers is being deployed by Microsoft Azure, the companies announced on Wednesday.  3M said on its April 21 earnings call that its new expanded beam optics technology had received validation and a significant order from a hyperscaler, which has apparently now been revealed to be Microsoft.

headline: What IBM’s Weak Report Reveals About the Market
summary: IBM’s weak preliminary report isn’t a sign of AI slowing but a leading indicator of the second wave of AI. Traditional enterprises are shifting budgets from software to hardware, proving that AI adoption has spread from Big Tech to the wider economy.

content.title: What IBM’s Weak Report Reveals About the Market
content.summary: IBM’s weak preliminary report isn’t a sign of AI slowing but a leading indicator of the second wave of AI. Traditional enterprises are shifting budgets from software to hardware, proving that AI adoption has spread from Big Tech to the wider economy.

headline: Leveraging Memory: Direxion Premiers Daily SK Hynix Bull 2X ETF
summary: On July 15, Direxion launched the Direxion Daily SK Hynix Bull 2X ETF (SKHL), seeking to replicate double the daily performance of the South Korean semiconductor manufacturers Sk Hynix (SKHY). The fund provides leveraged exposure to the world’s leading supplier of high-bandwidth memory chips. It boasts an expense ratio of 97 basis points. Key Takeaways [...]
